note_text:
Patient: 55M presenting with severe sensorineural hearing loss.
Conservative management including disease-modifying medication, corticosteroid injection was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with sensorineural hearing loss.
Referring ent physician requests authorization for cochlear implant.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with sensorineural hearing loss

note_text:

No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with sensorineural hearing loss.
Referring ent physician requests authorization for cochlear implant.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with sensorineural hearing loss

note_text:
Patient: 38M presenting with chronic chronic tonsillitis.
Conservative management including dietary and lifestyle modification, beta-blockers was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with chronic tonsillitis.
Referring ent physician requests authorization for tonsillectomy.

Patient: 65M presenting with chronic chronic tonsillitis.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring ent physician requests authorization for tonsillectomy.

Patient: 57F presenting with chronic chronic tonsillitis.
Conservative management including immunomodulator therapy was attempted over approximately 16 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with chronic tonsillitis.
Referring ent physician requests authorization for tonsillectomy.
